overview.description: The Naugaza Digambar Jain temple is situated near Naugaza in Alwar District, Rajasthan. The temple is situated near Neelkanth temple, Alwar.

topPlaces.name: Kankwadi
topPlaces.description: Kankwadi or Kankwari is the site of Kankwadi fort and village, located in the Sariska Tiger Reserve in Alwar district. The fort was founded by Jai Singh II as a famine work.

items.note: Kankwadi or Kankwari is the site of Kankwadi fort and village, located in the Sariska Tiger Reserve in Alwar district. The fort was founded by Jai Singh II as a famine work.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Naugaza Digambar Jain temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Naugaza Digambar Jain temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Naugaza Digambar Jain temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jaipur International Airport (71 km) and the nearest railway station is Jaipur Junction (66 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Naugaza Digambar Jain temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Naugaza Digambar Jain temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Naugaza Digambar Jain temple?
faq.a: Stays in Naugaza Digambar Jain temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.
